Development
Genetic Model Systems and the Characterization of Genes that Determine Body Plan

Genes that control development
Many are conserved
Can influence development in a spectrum from globally to even at single cell resolution
Can have late onset with adult lethal phenotype
Comparison of insect and mammalian homeotic genes

eyes absent

eyeless/Pax-6 is critical for eye development
